assets.name: Apple Inc.
assets.summary: iPhone sales in line with expectations. Services revenue steady but no major catalyst identified.

assets.name: Amazon.com Inc.
assets.summary: AWS growth stable at 17% YoY. Retail margins flat as consumer spending normalizes.

assets.name: Meta Platforms Inc.
assets.summary: Ad revenue steady. Reality Labs losses continue but within guided range.

headline: Tech Giants Report Mixed Results in Latest Earnings Season
